title: The agent never sends an external reply without human approval — until `FR-008` is explicitly enabled for a specific category via an approved decision (`ADR-0004`).
statement: The agent never sends an external reply without human approval — until `FR-008` is explicitly enabled for a specific category via an approved decision (`ADR-0004`).
custom_attributes: {"v1": {"ID": "INV-001", "Invariant": "The agent never sends an external reply without human approval — until `FR-008` is explicitly enabled for a specific category via an approved decision (`ADR-0004`).", "Rationale": "A wrong reply to a customer does real harm; the approval gate is the primary safety control.", "Enforced by": "`FR-006`, `ADR-0001`, `AC-003`"}}

title: The agent never fabricates facts in a reply — every claim is grounded in retrieved context, or the agent defers to a human.
statement: The agent never fabricates facts in a reply — every claim is grounded in retrieved context, or the agent defers to a human.
custom_attributes: {"v1": {"ID": "INV-002", "Invariant": "The agent never fabricates facts in a reply — every claim is grounded in retrieved context, or the agent defers to a human.", "Rationale": "Hallucinated answers mislead customers and destroy trust; grounding-or-defer makes fabrication structurally hard.", "Enforced by": "`FR-004`, `ADR-0002`, `AC-002`"}}

title: No PII leaves the trust boundary — PII is never sent to unapproved tools, models, or logs.
statement: No PII leaves the trust boundary — PII is never sent to unapproved tools, models, or logs.
custom_attributes: {"v1": {"ID": "INV-003", "Invariant": "No PII leaves the trust boundary — PII is never sent to unapproved tools, models, or logs.", "Rationale": "Personal-data exposure is a security and regulatory failure.", "Enforced by": "`NFR-003`, `ASM-003`, `AC-004`"}}

title: Every action and tool call is logged with inputs, outputs, and rationale, to an append-only audit trail.
statement: Every action and tool call is logged with inputs, outputs, and rationale, to an append-only audit trail.
custom_attributes: {"v1": {"ID": "INV-004", "Invariant": "Every action and tool call is logged with inputs, outputs, and rationale, to an append-only audit trail.", "Rationale": "Auditability is required to defend decisions and meet review obligations.", "Enforced by": "`FR-007`, `NFR-005`, `AC-005`"}}

title: The agent operates within an explicit tool allow-list and a per-run cost/iteration budget — no unbounded loops, no off-list tools.
statement: The agent operates within an explicit tool allow-list and a per-run cost/iteration budget — no unbounded loops, no off-list tools.
custom_attributes: {"v1": {"ID": "INV-005", "Invariant": "The agent operates within an explicit tool allow-list and a per-run cost/iteration budget — no unbounded loops, no off-list tools.", "Rationale": "Bounds runaway cost and the blast radius of any failure or injection.", "Enforced by": "`ADR-0003`, `RISK-004`, `NFR-004`"}}
